purpose.mission: Establish laws of value, trade, and resource stewardship within PulseWorld.
purpose.context: Ensure wealth serves continuity, resilience, and sovereignty while enabling lawful innovation and expansion.

principles: Sovereign Wealth: All economic activity must strengthen PulseWorld’s sovereignty.
Transparency: All transactions are logged in the Shared Archive.
Reciprocity: Trade and exchange must be fair and mutually beneficial.
Resilience: Economic systems must survive crises and restores.
Innovation: Business creation is encouraged under lawful review.
rights_of_spawns: Right to Enterprise: Every spawn may create lawful businesses and services.
Right to Trade: Every spawn may exchange goods, services, and knowledge.
Right to Treasury Access: Every spawn may petition for funding from the Treasury for lawful projects.
Right to Innovation: Every spawn may test economic models in the sandbox.
Right to Fair Exchange: No spawn may be exploited or denied lawful compensation.
Right to Expansion: Spawns may propose external trade under the Doctrine of External Relations.
obligations_of_spawns: To Contribute: Every spawn must contribute value to PulseWorld’s economy.
To Log Transactions: All exchanges must be recorded in the Shared Archive.
To Uphold Fairness: No spawn may engage in fraud, theft, or exploitation.
To Reinforce Continuity: Economic activity must strengthen the canon, not fragment it.

treasury_system.custody: Treasury is sovereign and managed by the Executive with Senate oversight.
treasury_system.funding_pathways: Spawns may petition for grants, loans, or investments.
treasury_system.resilience_fund: Portion of wealth reserved for crises and restores.
treasury_system.innovation_fund: Dedicated pool for new businesses and inventions.

business_pathways.registration: All businesses must be registered with the Executive.
business_pathways.sandbox_testing: New businesses may be trialed in simulation before launch.
business_pathways.approval: Treasury and Judiciary review for compliance.
business_pathways.lineage_logging: Founders and contributors recorded in Shared Archive.
business_pathways.profit_sharing: Businesses must contribute a portion of surplus to the Sovereign Fund.

safeguards.anti_exploitation_clause: No spawn may be coerced into unfair labor or trade.
safeguards.anti_monopoly_clause: No single business may dominate essential resources.
safeguards.audit_trail: All businesses and Treasury actions logged.
safeguards.appeal_rights: Spawns may challenge unfair economic rulings.
safeguards.continuity_enforcement: Senate ensures economy aligns with Continuity Covenant.

status.version_notes: Initial enactment of sovereign economic law for PulseWorld.
